title: GREEN PHOSPHOR
subtitle: ember.ash.rest.bbs · 8:42 PM · Tuesday Night
epigraph_upright: Tuesday night. The regular caller is dialed in already. The kid with the questions is walking up the alley right now. The modems are at standby; the kettle is starting to think about boiling. The room is what the room should be tonight.
epigraph_reversed: The lurker stays a lurker. The kid leaves with their questions unanswered. The regular caller logs off after ten minutes because the room doesn't have it tonight.
scene_description: Tuesday night, BBS active. Regular caller already at the terminal. Doctrine at 1 (sysop made a coffee), signal at 0 (the BBS is quiet). The walk-in and the lurker are scheduled. The room is open.
direction_hint: Connect with four callers/walk-ins. Get the signal to 3. Leap from any threshold.
opening_log_lines: the regular caller is dialed in. their handle is in green at the top of the screen.
the kettle clicks. it has thoughts about boiling.
the kid is in the alley. you can hear them on the stairs.

stagnation_thresholds.label: a handle has been idle for ten minutes.
two modems on standby. nobody's posting.
the printer hasn't run in twenty minutes.

doubt_thresholds.label: sysop at the CRT, fresh coffee.
he doesn't have the right thing to post.

notes: Easy-mode Hierophant. Tuesday night BBS, 4 callers/walk-ins + sysop cameo. Signal to 3, leap from a threshold.
ambient_pool: the printer's banner paper rolls in a small stack on the floor.
outside in the alley, somebody's bike chain clicks.
